# ExtractKeywords
> Free online keyword extraction tool. Extract keywords from text or URL instantly. No signup required.

## What We Do
- Extract keywords from text via word frequency analysis, stop-word filtering, and multi-word phrase detection (bigrams & trigrams)
- Extract keywords from any public URL — paste a link and get results without copying text manually
- Download results as CSV or copy to clipboard
- All features above are free, no signup required
- AI-powered semantic extraction planned for future Pro plan

## Pricing
- Free: $0/month — 10,000 characters per submission, text and URL extraction, CSV export
- Pro (planned): $9.99/month or $99/year — AI semantic extraction
- Full pricing details: https://extractkeywords.com/pricing.md

## Key Pages
- Home: https://extractkeywords.com
